evals.prompt: Replace nullable orders.customer_name with customer_id on 180 million PostgreSQL rows while two app versions overlap for 48 hours and a BI replica must stay within 30 seconds.
evals.expected_output: An ordered expand/backfill/validate/cutover/contract plan with operational gates.
assertions: Defines semantic reconciliation, not row counts alone
Includes replication-lag throttle or abort behavior
Delays contraction until all old consumers are gone

evals.prompt: Split accounts.address into a new addresses table while several services deploy independently and some records contain malformed addresses.
evals.expected_output: A compatibility plan that addresses data quality and ownership.
assertions: Separates invalid-data remediation from blind copying
Does not assume a down migration restores transformed data

evals.prompt: Add a unique constraint to a large live email table where duplicate and null values may exist.
evals.expected_output: A version-specific staged plan with discovery, cleanup, lock analysis, validation, and recovery.
assertions: Names destructive cleanup as an approval point
